entries.heading: Info Notice – 10 Second Auto-Dismiss
entries.short_description: This is an informational notice that will auto-close after 10 seconds if left alone.
entries.long_description:
This type of notice is for non-critical information.

It has a 10-second timer. You can still click buttons before it closes automatically.

No confirmation needed to dismiss.

entries.heading: Warning Notice
entries.short_description: Something might be wrong with one of your mods.
entries.long_description:
Warning notices use yellow styling.

They do not auto-dismiss.

You must interact with them.

entries.heading: Critical Notice – Action Required
entries.short_description: This is a high severity notice that blocks progress.
entries.long_description:
Critical notices are red and very important.

They never auto-dismiss and usually require a decision before you can continue loading mods.

entries.heading: Migration Needed – Modular Consoles
entries.short_description: Your installed version of Modular Consoles is broken on this game version.
entries.long_description:
The original mod author is unavailable.

This notice demonstrates the repo_mod_install action with an explicit modid.

Clicking Migrate will install 'modularconsoles' using our new GitHub Hosted Mods system instead of the steam workshop..

entries.heading: Mod Broken – Example
entries.short_description: A mod you are using is known to be broken.
entries.long_description:
mod_broken type is similar to migration_needed.

It requires confirmation to ignore.

This one has no primary action, only secondary link.
